name: Bluey's Ultimate Beach Cabin Playset: Outdoor Adventure Toy Set with 17 Pieces
description:
Now your kids can go on a beach holiday with Bluey and her family when they visit her Beach Cabin! The exclusive Bluey's Ultimate Beach Cabin playset is loaded with fun features to make it a vacation to remember! The Cabin is over 10" (25cm) wide and comes with everything Bluey and her family need to relax and play! There are different play areas for your child's 2.5-3" Bluey, Bingo, Bandit and Chilli figures to play in. They will love exploring the cabin with its toilet and shower, kitchen, deck and a lounge that converts to a bedroom when they pull down the shelves and TV! Plus this playset expands out to include its own beach for Bluey and Bingo to swim in. Thank goodness Bluey and her family are beach ready and wearing their rashies! This exclusive playset also comes with a fun watercraft that Dad loves to ride on. With 15 different play pieces including a surfboard, sand castle BBQ with umbrella and floatie, your kids will have hours of enjoyment recreating some of the most memorable moments from the show with these adorable toys! They can even decorate the Beach Shack their own way with their beach themed sticker sheet!

Includes:
10 X ACCESSORIES
4 X FIGURES
1 X PLAYSET
1 X STICKER SHEET
1 X VEHICLE
